languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, новости с Заркова. Случайный корабль чартиста принес вести о том, что планета была атакована неизвестными врагами Человечества, и ее обитатели просят {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} о поддержке!"

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, новости с Заркова. Случайный корабль чартиста принес вести о том, что планета была атакована неизвестными врагами Человечества, и ее обитатели просят {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} о поддержке!"

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, новости с Заркова. Случайный корабль чартиста принес вести о том, что планета была атакована неизвестными врагами Человечества, и ее обитатели просят {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} о поддержке!"

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A random Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting reinforcements from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

languages.text: 「貴方様、ザークフからの報告です。ランダムなチャリストの船が、地球外生命体によって攻撃されたという報告と、ローグトレーダーからの援軍を要請しています！」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A random Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting reinforcements from the Rogue Trader!"

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Zarkov'dan haber var. Geçen bir Haritacı gemisi, gezegenin İnsanlığın bilinmeyen düşmanlarının saldırısına uğradığını ve sakinlerinin {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir'den{/g} destek talep ettiği haberini iletti!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Zarkov'dan haber var. Geçen bir Haritacı gemisi, gezegenin İnsanlığın bilinmeyen düşmanlarının saldırısına uğradığını ve sakinlerinin {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir'den{/g} destek talep ettiği haberini iletti!"

languages.text: “大人，扎尔科夫传来急报。一艘路过的宪章船带来消息，称该行星遭受了未知人类之敌的袭击，当地居民正在请求{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}的援助！”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: “大人，扎尔科夫传来急报。一艘路过的宪章船带来消息，称该行星遭受了未知人类之敌的袭击，当地居民正在请求{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}的援助！”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Neuigkeiten von Zarkov. Ein Chartistenschiff meldet, dass der Planet von unbekannten Feinden der Menschheit angegriffen wurde und seine Bewohner {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}{/g}" um Unterstützung bitten!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Neuigkeiten von Zarkov. Ein Chartistenschiff meldet, dass der Planet von unbekannten Feinden der Menschheit angegriffen wurde und seine Bewohner {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}{/g}" um Unterstützung bitten!"

languages.text: « Des nouvelles en provenance de Zarkov, Votre Seigneurie. Le vaisseau d'un cartographe nous informe que la planète a été prise d'assaut par des ennemis de l'humanité non identifiés, et ses habitants demandent l'appui {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}{/g} ! »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: « Des nouvelles en provenance de Zarkov, Votre Seigneurie. Le vaisseau d'un cartographe nous informe que la planète a été prise d'assaut par des ennemis de l'humanité non identifiés, et ses habitants demandent l'appui {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}{/g} ! »

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, noticias de Zarkov. Una nave cartista nos ha informado de que unos enemigos de la Humanidad no identificados están atacando el planeta. ¡La población solicita refuerzos de su {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}!».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, noticias de Zarkov. Una nave cartista nos ha informado de que unos enemigos de la Humanidad no identificados están atacando el planeta. ¡La población solicita refuerzos de su {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}!».
